issuesFound.title: mobileNav.open() missing aria-expanded update
issuesFound.explanation: The open() function toggles the mobile navigation drawer visible but never sets aria-expanded="true" on the trigger button. Screen readers will not announce the expanded state, leaving users unaware the menu is open.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1850: After `_open = true;` add `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');`

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu._openInstance() missing aria-expanded update
issuesFound.explanation: When a dropdown panel is opened, the function does not set aria-expanded="true" on the trigger button. Only the close function sets it to false, so the state is never correctly announced as expanded.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2050: After `inst.open = true;` add `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');`

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion.open() missing aria-expanded update
issuesFound.explanation: The function expands a FAQ answer panel but fails to set aria-expanded="true" on the trigger button. The close function sets it to false, resulting in an inaccurate accessibility state.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2850: After `item.open = true;` add `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');`

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markInvalid() missing aria-invalid attribute
issuesFound.explanation: The validation utility adds an error description via aria-describedby but never sets aria-invalid="true" on the invalid field. Assistive technologies cannot identify the field as invalid.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav missing focus trap initialization
issuesFound.explanation: The module declares a _trap variable but never initializes it with createFocusTrap(). When the menu opens, keyboard focus is not confined to the drawer, allowing users to tab behind the modal overlay.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1820: After `_initialised = true;` add `_trap = createFocusTrap(_drawer, { returnFocus: _trigger });` and in the open() function at line 1855 add `if (_trap) _trap.activate();`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav.close() missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: The close function removes the drawer from view but does not announce the state change to screen readers. Unlike the open function, which announces "Navigation menu opened", users receive no feedback when the menu closes.
issuesFound.fix: Line 1880: Before `emit(_trigger, 'mobilenav:close', ...)` add `if (announceToSR !== false) { liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.navClosed || 'Navigation menu closed'); }`

issuesFound.title: productFilter tabs missing aria-pressed update

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markValid missing aria-invalid clearing
issuesFound.explanation: The markValid utility function removes the error message reference from aria-describedby, but it does not clear the aria-invalid attribute to "false" or remove it. The field remains marked as invalid to assistive technologies even after correction.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav init missing aria-controls
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation trigger button is not programmatically associated with the drawer panel via aria-controls. Screen readers cannot inform users which element is controlled by the trigger.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav drawer missing aria-hidden when closed
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation drawer is hidden using CSS classes that may only move it off-screen (transform/translate) rather than display:none. Without aria-hidden="true", screen readers may still navigate into the off-screen drawer content.
issuesFound.fix:
Line (in close function, after removeClass(_drawer, ...)): Add `setAttr(_drawer, ARIA.HIDDEN, 'true');`
  Line (in open function, after addClass(_drawer, ...)): Add `setAttr(_drawer, ARIA.HIDDEN, 'false');` or `removeAttr(_drawer, ARIA.HIDDEN);`

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markInvalid does not set aria-invalid
issuesFound.explanation: The markInvalid function links the error message via aria-describedby but fails to set aria-invalid="true" on the field. Screen readers will not announce the field as invalid, preventing users from understanding the error state.

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markValid does not clear aria-invalid
issuesFound.explanation: The markValid function removes the error description but does not set aria-invalid="false" or remove the attribute. The field may remain stuck in an invalid state for assistive technology even after correction.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav.open does not update aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The open function adds the visible class and announces the state but does not set aria-expanded="true" on the trigger button. Screen reader users will not know the menu is expanded.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav.close does not update aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The close function removes the visible class but does not set aria-expanded="false" on the trigger button. The trigger state remains inconsistent with the visual state.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav.open does not activate focus trap
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation drawer opens without trapping keyboard focus. Users can tab out of the menu into the background content, which is disorienting and violates modal dialog patterns.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav.init does not initialize aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The init function does not set aria-expanded="false" on the trigger button on page load. The initial state of the toggle is undefined for assistive technology.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu._openInstance does not update aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The _openInstance function shows the panel but does not set aria-expanded="true" on the trigger. The trigger state remains false even when the dropdown is open.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu._closeInstance does not update aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The _closeInstance function hides the panel but does not set aria-expanded="false" on the trigger. The trigger state remains true even when the dropdown is closed.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu._openInstance does not announce state change
issuesFound.explanation: Opening the dropdown does not announce the action to screen readers via a live region. Users may not be aware the menu has opened.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu._closeInstance does not announce state change

issuesFound.title: pricing.setPeriod does not announce period change
